hero.headline: Every fence *perfectly straight* — guaranteed
hero.subheadline: Chain link, wood, vinyl, repairs — Mobile's fence crew that measures twice, builds once.

services_section.label: THE BUILD
services_section.heading: Every fence, every repair, every detail
services_section.subheading: From new installs to storm damage fixes

services.title: Chain Link Fencing
services.description: Residential and commercial chain link installation. We mix concrete before setting every post for maximum stability.

services.title: Wood & Vinyl Fencing
services.description: Privacy fencing, picket fences, and custom designs. Quality materials, precise installation.

services.title: Fence Repairs
services.description: Storm damage, gate adjustments, post replacement. We fix what others got wrong.

services.title: Staining & Sealing
services.description: Protect your investment with professional wood fence staining and weatherproofing.

services.title: Gate Installation
services.description: Custom gates hung right the first time. Proper alignment and smooth operation guaranteed.

about.heading: Mobile fence specialists
about.body: We're a Mobile fence team that shows up when we say we will. Every post gets concrete mixed on-site, every measurement gets checked twice.

reviews.name: Melanie
reviews.text: Excellent work! Chain link fence came out perfectly straight. They mixed concrete before setting the poles. Awesome quality and people!

reviews.name: Josh O.
reviews.text: Great build time, quality work, reasonable pricing. Does great custom work — whatever your needs are, they make it possible.

reviews.name: Becky H.
reviews.text: Hired them for repairs after Hurricane Sally. Fixed gates that were hung wrong originally, then stained and sealed the fence. Beautiful results.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Mobile and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Quality fence installation throughout the Gulf Coast

cta.heading: Ready for a fence that's built right?
cta.body: Free estimates on all fence projects. We'll measure, quote, and deliver quality work on time.
